field_values.action_summary: The party enters a magnificent marble audience chamber to meet the Chieftain. The narrator struggles with the scale of the room and the furniture, which feels mismatched to the current Martian occupants.
field_values.camera_intent: Low-angle shots of chieftain to emphasize power; POV shots from narrator looking up at massive scale; Medium shots of tars_tarkas maintaining decorum
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Furniture height/scale relative to character height
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH004_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the overwhelming scale of the Martian political center through the physical discomfort and visual intimidation experienced by the narrator. The environment must feel ancient, grand, and mismatched to the current occupants via oversized marble architecture and furniture.

## Required Cast
- The Narrator
- tars_tarkas
- chieftain
- Martian Warriors/Crowd

## Required Environments
- chieftain_audience_chamber (Grand marble hall with gold/jewel inlays)

## Continuity Constraints
- Furniture height/scale relative to character height
- Chieftain position on throne

## Beat List
- BT001: Entry into the chamber
- BT002: Navigating the scale
- BT003: Confronting the hierarchy
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
